datasets.title: Southeast Asia Near-Real-Time Deforestation Alerts (2015–2025)
datasets.description: Daily forest loss alerts for Southeast Asia derived from satellite imagery and machine learning, aggregated to 1 km grid cells.

datasets.title: Southeast Asia Forest Cover Change Tiles (2000–2024)
datasets.description: Annual forest cover and loss statistics for Southeast Asia at 30 m resolution, tiled by subregion.

datasets.title: Global Annual Deforestation Rates (2001–2023)
datasets.description: Country-level annual deforestation estimates compiled from multiple remote sensing products.

datasets.title: Road Expansion and Forest Loss in Central Africa (2005–2020)
datasets.description: Panel dataset linking new road construction to forest loss in Central African countries.

datasets.title: Global Urban PM2.5 Sensor Network (2018–2025)
datasets.description: Hourly PM2.5 measurements from low-cost sensors deployed in 120 cities worldwide.

datasets.title: Global Shoreline Change and Coastal Erosion Indicators (1984–2020)
datasets.description: Shoreline positions and erosion/accretion rates for sandy coasts derived from satellite imagery.

datasets.title: African Freshwater Biodiversity Occurrence Records
datasets.description: Curated occurrence records for freshwater fish, invertebrates, and plants across African river basins.

datasets.title: South American Coastal Water Quality Profiles (2010–2024)
datasets.description: Vertical profiles of temperature, salinity, nutrients, and chlorophyll from coastal monitoring stations.

datasets.title: Global Beach Microplastics Transects (2012–2022)
datasets.description: Microplastics particle counts and polymer types from standardized beach transects worldwide.

datasets.title: European Renewable Energy Installations Registry (v3.1)
datasets.description: Point locations and attributes of wind, solar, and hydro installations across Europe.

events.title: Resilient Cities: Climate Adaptation Webinar Series – Session 1
events.description: An interactive webinar on climate adaptation strategies for urban heat, flooding, and water stress.

events.title: Resilient Cities: Climate Adaptation Webinar Series – Session 2
events.description: Focus on nature-based solutions for climate adaptation in coastal and riverine cities.

events.title: Designing Climate-Resilient Water Systems
events.description: A webinar on integrating climate projections into urban water infrastructure planning.

events.title: River Water Quality Citizen Science Workshop
events.description: Hands-on training for community groups monitoring river water quality.

events.title: Borneo Deforestation and Restoration Conference 2024
events.description: Regional conference on forest loss drivers and restoration solutions in Borneo.

events.title: PM2.5 and Urban Health: New Evidence from Low-Cost Sensors
events.description: Webinar presenting new research on PM2.5 exposure in rapidly growing cities.

events.title: Training: Integrating Renewable Energy into Regional Grids
events.description: Technical training on planning and operating high-renewables power systems.

events.title: Scaling Mangrove Restoration for Coastal Protection
events.description: Global webinar showcasing mangrove restoration projects and financing models.

projects.title: Lake Victoria Basin Freshwater Biodiversity Resilience Initiative
projects.description: Long-term monitoring and conservation planning for freshwater biodiversity in the Lake Victoria Basin across Kenya, Uganda, and Tanzania.
projects.objectives: Assess spatial and temporal patterns of freshwater biodiversity and identify priority areas for conservation interventions.
projects.methods: Combine field surveys, environmental DNA sampling, and remote sensing of land use to model species distributions.
projects.key_outcomes: New biodiversity baselines and conservation priority maps for Lake Victoria Basin.

projects.title: Congo Basin Freshwater Biodiversity Sentinel Network
projects.description: Establishing a network of freshwater biodiversity sentinel sites across the Congo Basin to track climate and land-use impacts.
projects.objectives: Create a representative network of freshwater monitoring sites across key tributaries of the Congo Basin.
projects.methods: Standardized sampling of fish and macroinvertebrates, water chemistry, and remote sensing of catchment land cover.
projects.key_outcomes: Harmonized datasets and indicators for freshwater ecosystem health in the Congo Basin.

projects.title: Okavango Delta Freshwater Biodiversity and Livelihoods Program
projects.description: Integrated assessment of freshwater biodiversity and community dependence on wetlands in the Okavango Delta.
projects.objectives: Quantify the links between freshwater biodiversity, ecosystem services, and local livelihoods.
projects.methods: Biodiversity surveys, participatory mapping, and socio-economic household surveys.
projects.key_outcomes: Policy recommendations for wetland management balancing conservation and livelihoods.

projects.title: Nile Delta Urban-Freshwater Biodiversity Interface Study
projects.description: Investigating freshwater biodiversity in the urbanizing Nile Delta and impacts of pollution and abstraction.
projects.objectives: Characterize freshwater biodiversity along urban–rural gradients in the Nile Delta.
projects.methods: Aquatic macroinvertebrate sampling, water chemistry analysis, and pollutant tracing.
projects.key_outcomes: Identification of pollution hotspots and management options to protect freshwater biodiversity.

projects.title: Sahel Ephemeral Streams Biodiversity Survey
projects.description: Baseline survey of freshwater biodiversity in ephemeral streams across the Sahel region.
projects.objectives: Generate reference data on taxa inhabiting ephemeral streams under changing rainfall regimes.
projects.methods: Rapid assessment protocols and taxonomic identification of macroinvertebrates.
projects.key_outcomes: First regional checklist of ephemeral stream taxa in the Sahel.

projects.title: Great Lakes Freshwater Biodiversity and Invasive Species Monitoring
projects.description: Coordinated monitoring of native and invasive species across the Laurentian Great Lakes.
projects.objectives: Track long-term biodiversity trends and invasion dynamics in the Great Lakes.
projects.methods: Trawl and gillnet surveys, eDNA, and automated imaging sonars.
projects.key_outcomes: Updated risk assessments for invasive species in the Great Lakes.

projects.title: Coastal Mangrove Restoration for Resilient Communities in Northeast Brazil
projects.description: Large-scale mangrove restoration along the coast of Northeast Brazil to enhance coastal protection and fisheries.
projects.objectives: Restore degraded mangrove forests and support community-based management.
projects.methods: Native species planting, hydrological restoration, and participatory monitoring.
projects.key_outcomes: Restored mangrove cover and improved coastal protection for local communities.
projects.location: Ceará and Rio Grande do Norte, Brazil

projects.title: Peruvian Coastal Reef and Seagrass Restoration Pilot
projects.description: Pilot interventions to restore degraded reefs and seagrass meadows along the Peruvian coast.
projects.objectives: Test the feasibility of combined reef and seagrass restoration approaches.
projects.methods: Coral gardening, seagrass transplanting, and artificial reef structures.
projects.key_outcomes: Protocols and lessons learned for scaling up coastal restoration along the Peruvian coast.

projects.title: Urban River Water Quality and Community Science Network (North America)
projects.description: A network of community groups and researchers monitoring water quality in urban rivers across North America.
projects.objectives: Improve spatial and temporal coverage of urban river water quality data through community science.
projects.methods: Training citizen scientists in low-cost sensor deployment and grab sampling following standardized protocols.
projects.key_outcomes: Open datasets and city-level water quality dashboards for participating urban areas.
projects.location: Multiple cities in USA and Canada

projects.title: Community-Led Water Quality Watch for African Great Lakes
projects.description: Community engagement project to monitor and improve water quality in shoreline communities around African Great Lakes.
projects.objectives: Empower shoreline communities to monitor and advocate for improved lake water quality.
projects.methods: Training workshops, mobile reporting tools, and collaboration with local laboratories.
projects.key_outcomes: Community-generated water quality alerts and targeted mitigation measures.
projects.location: Lake Victoria, Lake Tanganyika, and Lake Malawi shorelines

projects.title: Peri-Urban Water Quality and Community Health in South Asia
projects.description: Assessing links between peri-urban groundwater/surface water quality and community health outcomes in South Asia.
projects.objectives: Document water quality challenges and associated health outcomes in peri-urban communities.
projects.methods: Household surveys, water sampling, and participatory mapping of contamination hotspots.
projects.key_outcomes: Evidence base for local and national policies on peri-urban water management.
projects.location: Sites in India, Bangladesh, and Pakistan

projects.title: Global Ocean Microplastics Flux Monitoring Network
projects.description: Coordinated sampling of microplastics in surface and subsurface ocean waters to quantify global plastic fluxes.
projects.objectives: Quantify regional and global fluxes of microplastics across major ocean basins.
projects.methods: Standardized neuston net tows, in-line filtration, and spectroscopic polymer identification.
projects.key_outcomes: Improved constraints on ocean plastic budgets and priority regions for intervention.

projects.title: Microplastics Pathways from Asian Rivers to Coastal Seas
projects.description: Tracing microplastics transport from major Asian rivers into adjacent coastal seas.
projects.objectives: Quantify microplastics loads exported from large Asian rivers to the ocean.
projects.methods: Riverine sampling, estuarine surveys, and numerical transport modeling.
projects.key_outcomes: Estimates of microplastics source apportionment for selected coastal zones.
projects.location: Ganges, Mekong, and Yangtze river systems

projects.title: European Offshore Wind Integration Study
projects.description: Multi-country study on integrating large-scale offshore wind into European transmission networks.
projects.objectives: Assess technical, economic, and regulatory barriers to high levels of offshore wind in Europe.
projects.methods: Power system simulations, cost-benefit analysis, and stakeholder workshops.
projects.key_outcomes: Scenarios and recommendations adopted by several transmission system operators.
projects.location: North Sea and Baltic Sea regions

projects.title: Alpine Communities Solar Microgrid Demonstration
projects.description: Demonstration of islandable solar microgrids in remote Alpine communities.
projects.objectives: Demonstrate reliable microgrid operation and increased renewable penetration in Alpine villages.
projects.methods: Design and installation of solar-plus-storage systems and monitoring of performance.
projects.key_outcomes: Operational microgrids and templates for replication in other mountainous regions.
projects.location: Alpine communities in Switzerland and Austria

projects.title: Climate Adaptation Strategies for Asian Megacities under Extreme Heat
projects.description: Developing and testing adaptation strategies to reduce heat risk in Asian megacities.
projects.objectives: Co-produce adaptation pathways to reduce heat-related health impacts.
projects.methods: Climate modeling, urban design simulations, and participatory planning workshops.
projects.key_outcomes: City-level heat adaptation plans and policy briefs.

publications.title: Global Trends in Urban PM2.5 Concentrations from 2000 to 2018
publications.abstract: We compile satellite-derived and ground-based PM2.5 estimates to analyze global trends in urban air quality and identify regions with the largest health gains.
publications.topic: urban air quality; PM2.5; global trends

publications.title: Evaluating Low-Cost PM2.5 Sensors for Urban Air Quality Monitoring Networks
publications.abstract: This study evaluates the performance of several low-cost PM2.5 sensors in an urban environment and provides guidance for network design and calibration.
publications.topic: PM2.5; urban air quality; low-cost sensors

publications.title: Short-Term Health Impacts of PM2.5 Spikes in Megacities: Evidence from Emergency Admissions
publications.abstract: We link high-resolution PM2.5 data to emergency hospital admissions in three megacities to quantify short-term health risks.

publications.title: Air Pollution Inequality: Disparities in Urban PM2.5 Exposure Across Income Groups
publications.abstract: Using household survey data and PM2.5 exposure models, we quantify socio-economic disparities in urban air pollution exposure.

publications.title: Nature-Based Solutions for Reducing Urban PM2.5: A Multi-City Analysis
publications.abstract: We assess the potential of urban forests, green roofs, and street trees to reduce PM2.5 concentrations in 15 cities.
publications.topic: PM2.5; urban air quality; nature-based solutions

publications.title: High-Resolution Modeling of Urban PM2.5 for Exposure Assessment
publications.abstract: We present a modeling framework that downscales PM2.5 fields to 100 m resolution for intra-urban exposure assessment.

publications.title: Policy Interventions and Urban PM2.5 Reductions: Lessons from Ten Cities
publications.abstract: We evaluate the effectiveness of key policy interventions in reducing urban PM2.5 over the past decade.
publications.topic: PM2.5; policy evaluation; urban air quality

publications.title: Drivers of Recent Deforestation in Borneo: Commodity Expansion and Infrastructure
publications.abstract: We disentangle the relative contributions of oil palm, logging, and infrastructure to recent deforestation in Borneo.

publications.title: Long-Term Trends in Lake Water Quality in Temperate Regions
publications.abstract: Using multi-decadal datasets, we examine changes in nutrient and chlorophyll levels in temperate lakes.

publications.title: Revisiting Ocean Microplastics Budgets with New Field Observations
publications.abstract: We integrate new field data from remote ocean regions into global microplastics budget estimates.

publications.title: Quantifying Coastal Protection Benefits of Mangrove Restoration
publications.abstract: Using hydrodynamic models and field data, we quantify how mangrove restoration reduces coastal flooding.

publications.title: Grid Integration Challenges of High Offshore Wind Penetration in Europe
publications.abstract: We explore technical and regulatory challenges associated with integrating large shares of offshore wind into European grids.
publications.topic: renewable energy; offshore wind; grid integration

publications.title: Climate Adaptation Pathways for Coastal Cities: A Synthesis Report
publications.abstract: This report synthesizes evidence on climate adaptation pathways for coastal cities with a focus on nature-based solutions.

publications.title: Dataset Description: Global Urban PM2.5 Sensor Network (2018–2025)
publications.abstract: We describe the design, deployment, and data processing for a global network of low-cost PM2.5 sensors.
